college_info.college_name: Stella Mary's College of Engineering: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary:
The TNEA 2026 counselling application window is expected to launch in the first week of May 2026 for Stella Mary's College of Engineering admission to BE/BTech courses.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

faqs.question: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?
faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.

faqs.question: What is covered in Machine Design subject in B.Tech course?
faqs.answer:
Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.
The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.
Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.

faqs.question: What are the core subjects covered in M.Tech CSE program?

placements.overview: UG Degree (4 year) : In year 2017-18, for 4 year UG Degree, a total of 185 students were admitted at Stella Mary's College of Engineering and 165 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 165 students 81 were placed with median salary of INR 198000 and 8 students opted for higher studies. A total of 212 students were admitted in year 2018-19 for 4 year UG degree at Stella Mary's College of Engineeringand 163 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 163 students 103 were placed with median salary of INR 198000 and 6 students opted for higher studies.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Stella Mary's College of Engineering offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Stella Mary's College of Engineering offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Stella Mary's College of Engineering fee structure for all the courses is around INR 50,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer:
A:    Stella Mary's College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible.
AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Great placements and faculty.

review_content.Placements: Around 90% get placed. The highest package is 4.5 LPA, the lowest is 1.4 LPA, and the average is 3 LPA. The top recruiters are Amazon, Infosys, Deloitte, and TCS. About 85% get internships at Microsoft, EY, and ZS. Major roles are Software Developer, Analyst, Consultant, and Engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: The department offers modern labs, smart classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, and a rich library. Hostels are clean and secure, and the mess and canteen food is decent. Medical facilities are available 24/7. Sports infrastructure includes a gym, courts, and playgrounds.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The college is suitable only for students who want to be professional.

review_content.Placements: 65% of students get placed in my course. The highest package offered in my course is 4 LPA, and the lowest package is 1 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Infosys, Wipro, and Zoho visit the college for placements. 45% of students got internships in Infosys and Wipro. Manager posting is the top role offered in my course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are extremely good. Labs and the equipment are good in quality. They give much importance to sports and games. The hostel environment is good and the food is good in quality and taste. There are medical facilities and staff members who know something about medicines.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied because of the placement provided but teaching is excellent.

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage for our course is approximately 90 percent. The salary packages range from 12,000 to 20,000 per month. Still the roles provided are not always aligned with students' expectations as most placements are in manufacturing companies like Foxconn and Yamaha Motors. They also bring placement from EmbedUR. While the placement training program conducted by the college is commendable, there is a gap in providing roles directly related to the core field of electronics and communication engineering.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms in our department are well maintained and provide facilities to conduct lectures using presentations. The lab facilities are decent offering essential facilities for practical learning. The department has good WiFi connectivity. Each department has its own library which is easy to access. There is a spacious seminar hall equipped to host meetings and events. The hostel facilities are satisfactory with clean and comfortable accommodation. Food quality is excellent. Basic medical facilities are provided in a dedicated room. The college also has exceptional sports facilities, supporting activities like table tennis, volleyball, basketball etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides a good ambience.

review_content.Placements: About 75% of the students are placed in our college. The salary offered is about Rs. 28,000 per month. Top recruiting companies of our college are HCL and MNC companies like Wipro and Technopark. Almost 30% of the students got an internship in ManpowerGroup. Management, other working job sectors, technical and non-technical works are offered in our college. The minimum salary offered is Rs. 10,000 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and ambience are good. We have department Wi-Fi, labs, library and well-equipped facilities. We have a good hostel with an attached bathroom. They provide good quality food first aid kit, maximum hospitality and sports items are also provided by the college with a gym.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: College makes best placements.

review_content.Placements: In my college, there are 56 students. Rs 27k is the highest package whereas, the lowest package is Rs 17k in our course. Sutherland company is recruiting of our course. About 70 per cent of students internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, we have Wi-Fi and the best class in the college. We have the best classrooms and library in our college. In the library, we have the best books to read. Our college has one best hostel in that we have a study room and we have the best quality food. We can play sports and games.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are very helpful and they cleared all the doubts of all students. They are well qualified and knowledgeable. The teaching quality is the best and they teach very well. This course is very useful.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good lab and good college.

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage for our course is approximately 90 percent. The salary packages range from 12000 to 20000 per month. The roles provided are not always aligned with students expectations as most placements are in manufacturing companies like Foxconn and Yamaha Motors. They also bring placement from EmbedUR. While the placement training programme conducted by the college is commendable there is a gap in providing roles directly related to the core field of electronics and communication engineering.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and ambience are good. We have department Wi-Fi, labs, library and well equipped facilities. We have a good hostel with an attached bathroom. They provide good quality food first aid kit, maximum hospitality and sports items are also provided by the college with a gym.

On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Stella Mary's College of Engineering has a rating of 4.5 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 4.5, 4.5 and 4.5 as per reviews by students.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Mother Theressa College Of Engineering and Technology is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the Mother Theressa College Of Engineering and Technology programmes is around INR 44,700 to 3,20,000.

faqs.answer:
A:    Mother Theressa College Of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed Bachelor Degree (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B.Tech / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages). Examinations of minimum three years duration with at least 50% marks (45% marks in case of reserved categories) in the qualifying examinations.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.
The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH,  2003). No maximum age limit.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh.
Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. /AMIE in CSE/ CSIT/ Electronics & Computers Engg. /IT & Computer Science and Systems Engineering or equivalent from a UGC recognised University/ Institute.
Preference will be given to GATE qualified candidates over TS PGECET qualified candidates.

reviews_list.review_title: Choose the best college, before joining.

review_content.Placements: There was no placements in our college. Students may get placed, attending interviews off-campus. The highest package off-campus was 3LPA for CSE branch.
review_content.Infrastructure: There were many labs available. There was no Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms were not bad. Library was good. There was no hostel facility available in my college. Food was average in canteen. Sports and games activities were good in our college.
review_content.Faculty: Teaching quality was average. The faculties were not much helpful to the students. It was hard to prepare for the semester exams, because of self-preparation, without the help of faculties. The average pass percentage is 75.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college provides good placements and I recommend students to join this college.

review_content.Placements: Almost 40% of students got placed in our course. The average salary package offered was 3.5 LPA. This college was very good in terms of placements. The minimum salary package offered ranges from 3 LPA to 4 LPA. Many students got placed in 2022. This was the best college for students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was very good. It also provided a huge library. All laboratories were well-equipped. Every department was very good in this college. The library was clean and several books were available. Wi-Fi was very good, and the speed was better. Canteen was also available.

overview_faqs.question: Can Mother Theressa College Of Engineering and Technology be considered as a reputed Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Mother Theressa College Of Engineering and Technology are MBA/PGDM, B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, After 1th Diploma. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Mother Theressa College Of Engineering and Technology has a rating of 3.4 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 4, 2.9, 3.4 and 3.5 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: Mother Theressa College Of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure and placements.

content.Placements: As I had completed my Diploma we had a lot of options and few companies to get placed. The college got opportunities from TCS, Foxconn, etc. The package is up to 5-6 LPA. The roles we get are as interns and freshers. Mostly 50% of students will be placed in the recruiting and others are willing to go for higher studies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. We have all the labs. The hostel facility is available for girls. The hostel is free of cost. The hostel facilities are good. There is a library. We can get any books we need. Overall it is good.
content.Faculty: Teachers are well qualified. They are very helpful. They will give you a quality education. The course the college offers is very relevant to the future they will be compulsorily placed in those sectors. There will be a bright future they will be ready for future job offers. Semester exams are not that tough. We have well-qualified staff who taught us everything and important questions that will be accurate the pass percentage will be 80%.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mining Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: This is the worst college I have ever seen.

content.Placements: No placements are given by our college and there are also no such companies that come to our college and conduct interviews for placements. When we look at placements, this is the worst college and if you are interested in getting only a certificate, then you can join.
content.Infrastructure: There are no such facilities in our college; they won't teach computer basics, etc., for every branch except CSE and ECE. This is the worst college I have ever seen and when we come to faculty except mechanical and EEE faculty, the remaining faculty members are indescribable .

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Choose the best college, before joining.

content.Placements: There was no placements in our college. Students may get placed, attending interviews off-campus. The highest package off-campus was 3LPA for CSE branch.
content.Infrastructure: There were many labs available. There was no Wi-Fi facility. Classrooms were not bad. Library was good. There was no hostel facility available in my college. Food was average in canteen. Sports and games activities were good in our college.
content.Faculty: Teaching quality was average. The faculties were not much helpful to the students. It was hard to prepare for the semester exams, because of self-preparation, without the help of faculties. The average pass percentage is 75.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good placements and I recommend students to join this college.

content.Placements: Almost 40% of students got placed in our course. The average salary package offered was 3.5 LPA. This college was very good in terms of placements. The minimum salary package offered ranges from 3 LPA to 4 LPA. Many students got placed in 2022. This was the best college for students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was very good. It also provided a huge library. All laboratories were well-equipped. Every department was very good in this college. The library was clean and several books were available. Wi-Fi was very good, and the speed was better. Canteen was also available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with good faculty members.

content.Placements: About 10% of students were placed. There were not many reputed companies, but they were worth working for. They conducted several drives, and we got a chance to build our careers even before finishing our graduation. That is a very good thing. Faculty tried their best to get us olaced.
content.Faculty: Teachers were well qualified and friendly with students. They were very helpful. They solved all the doubts. The teaching style was also good. They had good teaching skills. The pass percentage was around 70% in our college. The syllabus was completed on time.

cut_off.college_name: Mother Theressa College Of Engineering and Technology Cutoff 2025: Check TS ICET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Mother Theressa College Of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Mother Theressa College Of Engineering and Technology TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 48319 and 136758 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competit

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 48319, 64128 and 116627, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Mother Theressa College Of Engineering and Technology. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Mother Theressa College Of Engineering and Technology MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 40758. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 37369, and the 2023 cutoff was 37817 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been fluctuating in the last 3 years.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and I recommend students to join this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was very good. It also provided a huge library. All laboratories were well-equipped. Every department was very good in this college. The library was clean and several books were available. Wi-Fi was very good, and the speed was better. Canteen was also available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: About 10% of students were placed. There were not many reputed companies, but they were worth working for. They conducted several drives, and we got a chance to build our careers even before finishing our graduation. That is a very good thing. Faculty tried their best to get us olaced.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good atmosphere, and it provides a memorable campus life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good. Huge classrooms and a library were available. They are improving facilities like projectors, digital classrooms, computer labs, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college for studying, and it provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure were excellent. Every classroom had a projector. Labs were excellent. The facilities in the hostel were good. The food was good, like the food in our home. Sports and games are conducted every year.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty members, placements, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has different types of departments. Our college provides good facilities. Our labs and classrooms are good and clean. Our library is full of books. Our college provides a canteen facility.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mother Theressa College.
reviews.review_text: We have all types of facilities like labs, classrooms, and a library with a good environment to study. There are cultural activities like sports and indoor and outdoor games. Our college has a canteen but has only limited types of food items.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with its faculty members and campus crowd.
reviews.review_text: There are 9 computer laboratories with Wi-Fi facilities, and more than 10 hardware laboratories. Our college has a great library with 5000 books. It provides canteen with good snacks, tiffins, as well as lunch of good quality. Our management constructing a campus hostel, and it is in progress.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of faculty members and unnecessary fines.
reviews.review_text: There is a very poor infrastructure for labs. There is no anything in labs other than OA. The hostel environment is good, and the food served is average. Mobiles are not allowed inside the campus, and if students are caught with mobiles, then they have to pay fine.

reviews.review_heading: It was not up to the mark and needed more changes on campus.
reviews.review_text: There was no Wi-Fi, and the classrooms were not up to the mark. For us, there was no hostel attached to the college, but later, campus hostels were provided for our sub-juniors. A canteen was available, and sports were encouraged during events like Independence Day, Republic Day, and fests such as the fresher's party and farewell party.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the faculty and placements but you can enjoy your college life here.
reviews.review_text: In this college good library and classrooms are there with good infrastructure and availability of hostel which is located at the terrace of the college. Food in the mess is good. A canteen is there with delicious food as well. You can play sports like Cricket, there's a large ground at the back of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied, feeling happy for making changes in college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a central library which contains a lot of books and compitative books to gain the knowledge. And our college has scheduled one class for every week for library hour. College is providing hostel for girls and has 2 canteens and a big play ground as well as Cricket ground.

reviews.review_heading: It is the worst college, and it doesn't have good labs and teachers.
reviews.review_text: Our college doesn't have good labs, and the labs are not comfortable. Teachers don't know anything, and they teach poorly. There are no hostel facilities in our college, and there is no mess. There was just a small canteen in which the prices of the food are high. The quality of the food is bad.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: PKG Group of Institutions offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and Teaching & Education. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech, BBA and UG Diploma. Whereas, at PG level, PKG Group of Institutions offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. PKG Group of Institutions fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,96,500 to 2,08,000.

faqs.answer: A:    PKG Group of Institutions offers Degree and Diploma courses including 9 UG and 5 PG courses. Additionally, it also has After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. PKG Group of Institutions has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Civil Engineering, Chemical Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, MBA/PGDM specializations in Sales & Marketing, UG Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering.
faqs.question: What kind of specializations are available in courses offered at PKG Group of Institutions?

faqs.answer: The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.

faqs.answer: The best choice depends on your career aspirations:· If you want to become a teacher: Opt for a B.Ed. It's the mandatory qualification for teaching in most schools.· If you want to pursue a career in research or a science-related field: A BSc would be more suitable. It provides a strong foundation for further studies and specialised careers.· If you're unsure: Consider your interests and skills. Do you enjoy teaching and interacting with students? Or are you more drawn to scientific exploration and research? Additional options:· M.Ed.: If you already have a B.Ed., you can pursue a Master of Education for career advancement or specialisation in a particular teaching area.· Diploma courses: Various specialised Diploma courses in education or related fields can enhance your skills and knowledge.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with our college.

review_content.Placements: Our college provided good placements in 2017. Around 40% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary offered was Rs. 35,000 per month. The lowest salary offered was Rs. 12,000 per month. Top compahad not visited our college. Our college had not provided internships for our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our department had Auto CAD and field survey labs with all equipment. Each classroom used to accommodate 60 students. The library had many technical and non-technical related books and magazines. The hostel was very clean. Our college surroundings were cleaned daily by the housekeeping staff. The food served in the hostel was healthy and tasty.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: This college is the best in Tamil Nadu zone.

review_content.Placements: Placements were good in this college. Probably for every year achieving 90% of placements of that batch. The highest salary package offered was 5.5 LPA, and the average salary pacakge offered was 3.5 LPA. The lowest salary pacakge offered was 2 LPA. Top MNCs were TCS, CTS, Infosys, Broadcom, etc. Almost 60-70% of students got internships. The top roles offered were software developer, machine design, VLSI designer, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good. It has a highly equipped laboratory for each department. Thiruvalluvar library was the highlighted one. It has a separate huge building for the library. The classrooms were good and provide water facilities. The food served in the hostel was good.

review_summary.college_name: Einstein College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Einstein college is the best!

content.Placements: From the 3rd semester onwards, students get eligible for campus placements and the placement department also provides us with several trainings so that we can perform excellently in our placement session. Almost 90% of the students get placed in my batch. The one who got the highest salary package was around 34 lacs per annum and the average salary package was around 8 lacs per annum.
content.Infrastructure: Our college organizes many festivals and events to maintain a good bond between the students and the faculty members. The campus is not so big but has a beautiful infrastructure. The hostels are very close to the college, within walking distance. The canteen is also present in our college, which serves great-quality food. Wi-Fi is provided to us on a timely basis.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I would like libraries to have more books that improve knowledge.

content.Placements: At the end of the 2nd semester, we are eligible for placement drives, but for a job after the 3rd semester is complete, the college will grant permission to join the job and also have an opportunity for an off-campus drive. Around 15 to 18 companies visited our college, and around 75 to 80 percent of students got placement. Our courses have the highest package of INR 14 lacs, and our average course package is around INR 5 lacs. Some of the students start startups and join jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel rooms are large; there are 4 students in a room, and four beds are given by the college for a room. The hostel was routinely cleaned, the toilets were cleaned daily, and the food in the mess was quite awesome. I am not a hosteller, but these things are informed by my friends. External Expenses: Rs. 2000–Rs. 4000

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with our college.

content.Placements: Our college provided good placements in 2017. Around 40% of students got placed in our college. The highest salary offered was Rs. 35,000 per month. The lowest salary offered was Rs. 12,000 per month. Top compahad not visited our college. Our college had not provided internships for our course.
content.Infrastructure: Our department had Auto CAD and field survey labs with all equipment. Each classroom used to accommodate 60 students. The library had many technical and non-technical related books and magazines. The hostel was very clean. Our college surroundings were cleaned daily by the housekeeping staff. The food served in the hostel was healthy and tasty.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: This college is the best in Tamil Nadu zone.

content.Placements: Placements were good in this college. Probably for every year achieving 90% of placements of that batch. The highest salary package offered was 5.5 LPA, and the average salary pacakge offered was 3.5 LPA. The lowest salary pacakge offered was 2 LPA. Top MNCs were TCS, CTS, Infosys, Broadcom, etc. Almost 60-70% of students got internships. The top roles offered were software developer, machine design, VLSI designer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good. It has a highly equipped laboratory for each department. Thiruvalluvar library was the highlighted one. It has a separate huge building for the library. The classrooms were good and provide water facilities. The food served in the hostel was good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: Everything is good here. But sometimes we felt like we were still studying in a school.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are quite good. Some MNCs visited the campus, and our friends were placed in companies like HCL and Range etc. Around 50% to 60 % of the students were placed from the college. Many good companies visit the campus to hire the students of ECE and CSE departments when compared to mechanical and civil branches. It is a good college when compared to other colleges in Tirunelveli district.
content.Infrastructure: Our college had an infrastructure that we see in any other college. Labs and classrooms are quite good, neat and clean. We have a big open auditorium for cultural events. The college celebrates two events very grandly. One is freshers' day, and the other one is college day which is held on March 14. We have separate hostels for men and women. Food varieties offered are okay here. We have 50 buses for transport facilities. The bus facility is provided for students who live within 60 km distance from the college. All the labs were named with the names of famous scientists related to that subject.

reviews.review_heading: Good College for Studies who wish to study Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. Classrooms are spacious. Labs are good. I am not so happy with hostel. Laptops and phones are not allowed in hostels. Also, ladies have to get into hostel before 6 pm. There are some other changes now. Those who are very studious and would like to do some projects are recommended to choose some other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: The college has the good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college has the good infrastructure and air surrounding. I stayed in the hostel for a year as I enjoyed. The food quality in the hostel is good compared to the other college hostel. Thiruvalluvar library has the good infrastructure, and many more books are available. The canteen is placed at the centre of the college. The plastics are avoided inside the college campus as it is pollution free campus.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a very good college.
reviews.review_text: It has a very good infrastructure with labs and classrooms. Good staffs and a clean environment are provided. The hostel facilities are up to the mark. The college is focusing on sports too. The fees are moderately low compared to other colleges nearby. The college is worthy. There is no Wi-Fi facility, and mobile phones are not allowed.

reviews.review_heading: This college gave me the belief that everything lies in my own hands.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by our college are well-maintained classrooms and well-stocked libraries. The quality of the hostel is sometimes dusty, but we people make it clean, and the food they provide is sometimes disgusting. The canteen facility is also only available during college hours.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in my experience.
reviews.review_text: The hostel provides a lot of facilities, including public to private facilities for both males and females. Dorms and washrooms are maintained and cleaned here. It also provides laundry service, medical services, and safety. The quality of food is healthy, and they serve it 4 times a day in a specific time slot. The hostel facilities, along with the feels, are highly cost-effective and convenient as well.

highlights.summary:
The CMAT 2026 result has been declared for Anjaneya University admission to the MBA/PGDM/MMS courses. Students can download their scorecards by logging into the official website.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro: Anjaneya University popularly offers courses such as BSc, BTech and BCA with the duration varying from 3 years to 4 years. Moreover, the fee structure of the respective courses vary from INR 84K to INR 3.2 Lakh. Admission to these courses is based on merit. Therefore, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in Class 12. Furthermore, the University offers in various specialisations. For more details around Anjaneya University popular programmes, check out the table below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: These Degree and Diploma courses are offered across multiple streams, namely Business & Management Studies, Engineering, IT & Software, Architecture & Planning, and many more. The University offers UG and PG courses in full-time mode. Anjaneya University admission criteria are both merit and entrance-based, depending on the programme. The Anjaneya University course fee include tuition fees ranging from INR 16K to INR 3.2 Lakh. For more details around Anjaneya University courses, fees and eligibility, check out the table below:

faqs.answer: A:    Anjaneya University BSc is a 3 year course, offered in various specialisations.  The University offers BSc on the basis of merit and requires for candidates to secure valid scores in Class 12 and qualify any previously given examination. The final selection to Anjaneya University is based on merit; therefore, candidates must secure the minimum aggregate in Class 12 to get shortlisted for the final admission and pay the fees to confirm the seat (if shortlisted).
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BSc at Anjaneya University?

faqs.answer: A:    Anjaneya University is not very difficult to seek admission at. Candidates are required to meet the minimum eligibility criteria and qualify Class 12 and graduation, depending on the course opted for. Admission at Anjaneya University is based on merit and entrance. Therefore, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 45% to 50% in Class 12 for admission to UG level programmes. For PG level programmes, candidates must secure minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation and secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams.
faqs.question: Is Anjaneya University hard to get?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, one can join Anjaneya University undergraduate courses after completing Class 12. However, such students must still satisfy the preset admission criteria of the desired course. Students are shortlisted on a merit basis for all of the UG courses hence, Class 12 scores are enough for admission. To get into PG or PhD courses Class 12 marks are not enough. Eligible students can apply online by filling out the application form available at the website.
faqs.question: Can I join Anjaneya University after Class 12?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: The college has really good infrastructure. I was impressed when I saw the college.

review_content.Placements: BCA graduates found internships in IT support web development and software roles. Many were placed in leading IT companies and service providers. BCA admissions were merit based with no complex entrance requirements. The process was smooth and well coordinated.
review_content.Infrastructure: Computer labs with the latest hardware and software support practical training. Access to e libraries and online coding platforms added value. The college infrastructure was really good. We could play on the ground or organize events there. I was impressed when I saw the infrastructure.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The college and the location are also good. Faculty members are very helpful.

review_content.Placements: Mechanical students had access to internships in manufacturing, automobile, and energy sectors. The placement cell brought in both core mechanical companies and IT recruiters, offering diverse career options. There were coding clubs, AI/ML groups, and gaming societies where CSE students collaborated and learned beyond academics. These communities prepared them for industry readiness.
review_content.Infrastructure: The mechanical labs had updated machines, a CAD/CAM setup, and a workshop that helped in hands-on learning. Spacious classrooms and a digital library added to the learning environment. The infrastructure was very good, and they organized many events in the university.

faqs.answer: Anjaneya University course eligibility requires students to pass the last qualifying exam with a certain aggregate. Admission to the courses offered at the university are made primarily on a merit basis, however, entrance may also be accepted for programmes, such as PhD and MBA. To get into the undergraduate courses at the university, students must have passed Class 12 or equivalent with relevant subjects. Similarly, for PG admissions, graduation in a relevant field is required.
faqs.question: Q: Who is eligible for Anjaneya University admission?

faqs.answer: To get admission into Anjaneya University, students need to clear the admission criteria of the desired course. Eligible students can apply through the website of the university. The university shortlists candidates on a merit basis for most of the courses except for MBA and PhD. Final selection is done based on academic performance and other selection rounds (if applicable). To secure a spot, students need to pay the admission fees of the university and go through document verification.
faqs.question: Q: What is the admission process for Anjaneya University?

faqs.answer: Anjaneya University offers courses in UG and PG level in full-time mode on the basis of merit and accepted entrance exam scores. Anjaneya University fee structure includes tuition fees ranging from INR 16K to INR 3.2 Lakh. Apart from the tuition fees, the fees structure also includes various other components such as the hostel fees and other security deposits.

Registered candidates must then login using the registered credentials and fill out the application form. Once the form is filled, students can submit the form to complete the application process.

faqs.question: How can I apply for admission at Anjaneya University, Raipur?

answer.text: Yes, one can join Anjaneya University undergraduate courses after completing Class 12. However, such students must still satisfy the preset admission criteria of the desired course. Students are shortlisted on a merit basis for all of the UG courses hence, Class 12 scores are enough for admission. To get into PG or PhD courses Class 12 marks are not enough. Eligible students can apply online by filling out the application form available at the website.

faqs.question: Can I join Anjaneya University after Class 12?

answer.text: Yes, Anjaneya University applications are out now. Students seeking admission into the university can apply for the desired programme by completing the multi-step process. The entire process commences online. Interested candidates can apply on the university's official site. Aspirants must ensure that they fulfil the admission criteria of the course and apply before the last date.

faqs.question: Are applications out for Anjaneya University?

answer.text: Anjaneya University offers courses such as MBA on the basis of merit and entrance. Candidates must secure a minimum aggregate in graduation and accepted entrance exams such as MAT/ CAT/ XAT/ IIFT/ NMAT/ SNAP/ TISSNET/ CMAT/ IBSAT/ GMAT or any equivalent exam. Final selection is based on the entrance results of the candidates and after paying the fees.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to the Anjaneya University MBA course?

answer.text: Yes, Anjaneya University Raipur is approved by both UGC and AICTE. The university offers various courses in full-time mode and admissions to all are made based on the criteria set by the university. A degree from Anjaneya University is widely accepted and valid. Aspirants can visit the university's official website to apply for any courses.

faqs.question: Is Anjaneya University Raipur approved by UGC?

answer.text: Anjaneya University generally does not accept direct admissions for any of its courses. Students seeking to get into the university must satisfy the criteria set by the university. Candidates are selected either based on merit or entrance (MBA and PhD). Even for courses for which merit is considered, applicants must still fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria as per the university's guidelines. However, students may get in touch with the university to know more about the admission chances of the desired course.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to Anjaneya University?

answer.text: Anjaneya University is not very difficult to seek admission at. Candidates are required to meet the minimum eligibility criteria and qualify Class 12 and graduation, depending on the course opted for. Admission at Anjaneya University is based on merit and entrance. Therefore, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 45% to 50% in Class 12 for admission to UG level programmes. For PG level programmes, candidates must secure minimum aggregate of 50% in graduation and secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams.

faqs.question: Is Anjaneya University hard to get?

answer.text: Anjaneya University provides a safe and secure environment for the students. The University has a well-guarded premises that operates on rules and regulations provided by the authorities. Anjaneya University also has a redressal cell to bring any kind of discrepancy or inconvenience into consideration. The faculty and staff takes great initiative to maintain the decorum at the campus. review_summary.college_name: Anjaneya University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Filmmaking - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The college is good. They host many events on campus.

content.Placements: Filmmaking students got internships with production houses, ad agencies, and OTT platforms. The placement cell connected them with industry projects. The university listed several top recruiters for its programs, including major companies. Even though the filmmaking program was creative and specialized, the placement data indicated that graduates were being recruited by a wide range of corporate and tech firms.
content.Infrastructure: Students had access to film studios, modern editing suites, and screening halls. The infrastructure supported creative experimentation and learning. Students enjoyed using the facilities, and the infrastructure was really good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college has really good infrastructure. I was impressed when I saw the college.

content.Placements: BCA graduates found internships in IT support web development and software roles. Many were placed in leading IT companies and service providers. BCA admissions were merit based with no complex entrance requirements. The process was smooth and well coordinated.
content.Infrastructure: Computer labs with the latest hardware and software support practical training. Access to e libraries and online coding platforms added value. The college infrastructure was really good. We could play on the ground or organize events there. I was impressed when I saw the infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college and the location are also good. Faculty members are very helpful.

content.Placements: Mechanical students had access to internships in manufacturing, automobile, and energy sectors. The placement cell brought in both core mechanical companies and IT recruiters, offering diverse career options. There were coding clubs, AI/ML groups, and gaming societies where CSE students collaborated and learned beyond academics. These communities prepared them for industry readiness.
content.Infrastructure: The mechanical labs had updated machines, a CAD/CAM setup, and a workshop that helped in hands-on learning. Spacious classrooms and a digital library added to the learning environment. The infrastructure was very good, and they organized many events in the university.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligences) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: First visit and then decide.

content.Placements: Some students got placed last year. The highest package was 26 LPA. When you could visit the college before admission, you could see the board of students who got a placement. But don't depend on the college. You could apply for internship programs after 2 years of completing this college. It also provided internship programs in different states.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure but not excellent. Hostels were also good. Wi-Fi was available. Labs and library were also available. This college provided bed, almirah, and bathroom. You had to bring cution and blanket of your own. Friendly rooms mates of your want to stay with roommates.

admission_overview.college_name: Anjaneya University Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: Anjaneya University admission criteriaare both merit and entrance-based depending on the programme. The university accepts students who satisfy the eligibility and selection criteria of the offered course. Students can pursue various undergraduate, postgraduate, diploma, doctoral, and certificate courses at the university in various fields, such as Engineering, Management, Computer Applications, and more. The university accepts several national-level entrance exams for its MBA programme. Aspirants can read the following article to learn about the programmes, eligibility, selection criteria, and process to get intoAnjaneya University.

Anjanyea University course admissionis subject to fulfilling the admission criteria as set by the university. The college accepts applications primarily on a merit basis, however, students may need to provide valid entrance scores for certain courses, such as MBA. Those looking to get into the UG courses are required to pass Class 12 or equivalent, whereas PG admissions require graduation scores. Students can check out the following table to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for popularAnjaneya University courses:

Students seeking to get admission into any of the programmes offered at Anjaneya University need to complete a multi-step process. The admission process for the university mainly takes place online. The university provides multiple courses in full-time mode. Aspiring students can follow the steps explained below to complete theAnjaneya University admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

To apply for any of the Anjaneya University courses, students need to visit the official website of the university and fill out the application form. To complete the process, students must pay the application fees.
Step 2: Selection Process

Shortlisting is done based on the criteria set by the university for the offered programmes. Candidates are selected based on their performance in the last qualifying for most of the programmes except for MBA and PhD. For MBA, students must provide valid entrance scores obtained in exams, such as NMAT, XAT, CAT, MAT, GMAT, etc. Further, for PhD admissions, students need to appear for university-level entrance exam.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
Once an admission offer is made, students need to go through document verification and pay theAnjaneya University feesto confirm the seat.

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth to consider T.J.S Engineering College as a good Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: T.J.S Engineering College is a renowned institution offering B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Engineering. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. T.J.S Engineering College boasts an impressive review rating of 3.95 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.67 for Campus Life, 3.29 for Placements, 4.79 for Faculty, and 4.63 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: T.J.S Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: T. J. S Engineering College is a really good college.

content.Placements: T. J. S. Engineering College is one of the best colleges in Tamil Nadu. This college is reputed for placements. This college conducts more campus interviews. More MNC companies offered more jobs to these college students. The highest salary is 14 LPA. And the lowest salary is 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: T. J. S. Engineering College has good modern classrooms, good laboratories and a library. This college provides Wi-Fi network facilities. This college hostel is maintained very cleanly for daily use. A variety of foods are provided by this college mess.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and good infrastructure in 2018.

content.Placements: 75% of the students are placed. 3.5 Lacks per annum is the highest package offered, 2.3laks is the lowest per annum. Infinity solutions was the top recruiter. Tech support, developer are top roles offered. 50% percent of students got an internship from the Electronic and communication engineering in the Production company.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms with projectors, labs with new technology, Lab bench all the Instruments in one workbench. Library with computer internet connection, lots of collection of various author books. The hostel is located near the college, food available is okay for the money, sports are always appreciated.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our college is average in providing all the requirements which a college needs.

content.Placements: I don't know much about my college. Our college is in Puduvoyal, and I know a little about placements. Our final year students got placed in top companies like TCS, etc. Our college conducted AMCAT training for our batch this year, which is useful to gain knowledge about the aptitude. Some good companies visit our college for placements, and good placements depend on students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is average. Our college has a separate mess, but the food served is not that good. However, it is hygienic. All the labs are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: I'm absolutely satisfied because of our faculty, placements and the best infrastructure.

content.Placements: The college offers excellent placement opportunities in core companies like TCS, CTS, and Infosys, etc. Nearly 80% of the students get placed in reputed companies. The salary packages offered is up to 4 LPA. Around 70% of the students get internships from our college. The average stipend offered is Rs.10,000 per month. Internships bridge the gap between curriculum and industry.
content.Infrastructure: TJS Engineering College has architecturally designed buildings of 200000 square feet. The campus is spread over 50 acres and is surrounded by green lands. This institution has a great reputation. Our institution is Wi-Fi enabled. All the other facilities like well-equipped labs and the best library are available here. All the classrooms are equipped with a projector.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is good. Our faculty are experienced. Placements are good here.

content.Placements: Around 85% of the students were offered placements this year. Top recruiters like Amazon, TCS, CTS, Infosys, Syntel, Virtusa, Cellcom, and Habile, etc., visit the campus for placements. The highest salary package offered was 9 LPA, and the lowest was 2 LPA. Roles such as software developer and tester are offered to students. Around 90% of the students were offered internships. The highest stipend offered is Rs. 15,000, and the lowest was Rs. 8,000.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, and the college also provides a Wi-Fi facility. Our computer labs are fully air-conditioned, and the library has a lot of books for each department. Medical facilities, huge playground for cricket and volleyball are also available here. Students of our college won championships in other colleges too. Smart classrooms are available with projectors.

paragraphs: T.J.S Engineering College admissionis based on both merit or exam scores of the candidates. Besides, T.J.S Engineering College considers scores in GATE, CEETA, and TNEA for admission to specific courses.T.J.S Engineering Collegeoffers courses at the UG and PG levels.
The college offers UG programmes for 3 years - 4 years. For programmes at PG level, the duration is 2 years.
The total tuition fee for UG programmes isINR 2,00,000. Likewise, the PG programmes fee isINR 50,000. Students can pay the fee amount via online or offline mode.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, and the college also provides a Wi-Fi facility. Our computer labs are fully air-conditioned, and the library has a lot of books for each department. Medical facilities, huge playground for cricket and volleyball are also available here. reviews.review_heading: Right place to shape your mind.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my college is splendid and legit one. Classrooms have projectors for a practical approach. Good internet and Wi-Fi enabled campus. Teachers behaves in a very respectable and friendly manner, They are available for every student to clear their doubts. They solve the doubts and explain in a simple way. And we found it very helpful. The management trying to best to place the students to best companies for better future. Good hostel facility and provide good and healthy food me...

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and decent placements.
reviews.review_text: They provide all the facilities like labs, classroom, and sports room. All the equipment required for sports is available in the college. They provide different varieties of food in the canteen, including both vegetarian and non-vegetarian. There is also a shop which provides chocolates and icecreams. There is a separate hostel for both boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure was good for what you paid, and the food was also good. Od was also good.
reviews.review_text: It had basic college facilities. There was no Wi-Fi. In the hostel, the food was good. It was Tamil and Telugu cuisine. There was a room to play and a ground as well. At the mess, the timings were different for breakfast and lunch because lunch at 11:30 AM was lunchtime. Each year students received different times by swapping.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure. The location is an issue.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure but the location is remote which is an issue. They did not provide proper bus to students. No mess also. They claim to have wi fi but in reality it is not there.

reviews.review_heading: Review is very good, not disappointment. It is good.
reviews.review_text:
1. All the facilities are there in my college, very good teaching. The hostel is nice, the food is nice, the bus facilities, AC labs, classrooms are very good, the library is there good.
2. All the facilities are there and more than anything food is too good and medical facilities are not there and they arrange immediate care and then go to the hospital. But the hospital is 1 km away only don't worry about it.

reviews.review_heading: Review of T.J.S Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Our college has facilities like Wi-Fi, labs with separate systems for each student and the required experimental setup, classrooms with LCD projectors and blackboards etc. A well-organised canteen is available that provides tasty and unlimited food, in both breakfast and lunch, at nominal prices.

highlights.summary:

A few more updates are given below:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Really helpful and experienced faculty.

review_content.Placements: As I am in my 1st year of college I can only tell about my seniors. Nearly all the students in my course were offered a job based on their skills. Some of the students were interns in companies like HCL, TCS etc. The package depends solely on the talent of a student here in this college. Many got decent packages and are currently well settled.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities are not so good not so bad but more like average. Every basic thing is there like library labs broadband etc. The quality of food provided is good as per the cost. Sports and games are given equal importance too. Medical checkup camps are also being organised in the campus from time to time as we all believe that health is wealth. A healthy mind can do anything.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: There is a good environment for study. Teachers clear all the doubts of the students.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 70 students were in my course. Some are financially weak, but this college gives opportunities to those students who are financially weak because of the lower fee. It gives B.Tech. students a salary range of between INR 18 and 20k per month. If you are financially weak and want to do a B.Tech., then come to this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no facility for Wi-Fi or a library in a hostel. The college library is available. There is a facility on the ground to play games and a proper clean room with beds, a study table, and chairs for students. I recommend you take a hostel with a MS facility for Rs 2500.

faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Siddhi Vinayak Group of Colleges:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Siddhi Vinayak Group of Colleges provides Full Time programs at the UG and PG levels. These courses are available in multiple streams like Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies, and have a fee structure of around INR 66,000 to 3,15,500. UG programs include B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and B.Pharma. Further, the PG programs include M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA.

faqs.answer: A:    Courses offerred by Siddhi Vinayak Group of Colleges are approved by eminent Government bodies like AICTE, PCI. The combined seats available for courses offered at Siddhi Vinayak Group of Colleges goes up to 867.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for various courses offered at Siddhi Vinayak Group of Colleges?

review_content.General: The library in the college is average and doesn't provide any books for civil engineering branch. Wi-Fi facilities are available in the college. Classrooms are very bad. Quality of food is average. Hostel rooms are average. There are not many facilities in the hostel. The quality of food provided in the hostel is average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: This is the best engineering college in Alwar.

review_content.Placements: Placements in the college are not that good, but the students, who completed their degree from this college are currently working in reputed organisations such as the government sector as well as PSUs. Students from this college are IES members, and most of the students are in MNCs.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. All the facilities are well-mannered, and labs are properly set. Sitting arrangements are classic. Auditorium and canteens are available in the college, and they are in good condition. There is a big playground and a small garden. Courses like B.Ed, BBA, MBA, BCA, MCA, diploma in engineering, etc., are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Siddhi Vinayak College, Alwar, Rajasthan.

review_content.Placements: In the beginning of this college, placements were quite good but at the time of my batch i.e. 2011-2015 and the previous one, the placement department were not working properly and no companies visited the college. Neither I nor my friends got placed from this college.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good but there is no Wi-Fi for the students, it is only for the faculty members. There is no medical facility too. The sports activity is average and the sports week is organized once in a year. The library is quite good but there is a lack of good books. Labs are good and properly managed with an average canteen.

review_summary.college_name: Siddhi Vinayak Group of Colleges Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, experience faculty, excellent facilities.

content.Placements: Every year 80 to 90% student get placed in various MNC's and remaining student pursue higher studies. The highest package offered is of 12 Lacs per year and average package is of 6 to 7 Lacs and for the lowest is 2.5 t 3 Lacs. 100% students get internships in different domain like web development, application development, Ml, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is quite good enough. Classrooms are spacious, ventilated properly. Various advance technology are present in our classrooms like smart boards. Different labs are present for different courses and they are huge enough. Wi-Fi facility is available through out the college campus. Library consist of many technical books and online website is to download soft copies of newly launched books. Living space is clean & food is hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The college has poor teaching quality and poor facilities.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities are not provided in Siddhi Vinayak Polytechnic College. No company visits this college. The college doesn't provide internships. No placement cell is present in this college. Even our senior batch didn't get placements. Internships were also nil.
content.Infrastructure: The library in the college is average and doesn't provide any books for civil engineering branch. Wi-Fi facilities are available in the college. Classrooms are very bad. Quality of food is average. Hostel rooms are average. There are not many facilities in the hostel. The quality of food provided in the hostel is average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: This is the best engineering college in Alwar.

content.Placements: Placements in the college are not that good, but the students, who completed their degree from this college are currently working in reputed organisations such as the government sector as well as PSUs. Students from this college are IES members, and most of the students are in MNCs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. All the facilities are well-mannered, and labs are properly set. Sitting arrangements are classic. Auditorium and canteens are available in the college, and they are in good condition. There is a big playground and a small garden. Courses like B.Ed, BBA, MBA, BCA, MCA, diploma in engineering, etc., are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Review of Siddhi Vinayak College, Alwar, Rajasthan.

content.Placements: In the beginning of this college, placements were quite good but at the time of my batch i.e. 2011-2015 and the previous one, the placement department were not working properly and no companies visited the college. Neither I nor my friends got placed from this college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good but there is no Wi-Fi for the students, it is only for the faculty members. There is no medical facility too. The sports activity is average and the sports week is organized once in a year. The library is quite good but there is a lack of good books. Labs are good and properly managed with an average canteen.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2017

content.Other: Good infrastructure, experienced and great faculty, hostel is also good. Hygienic food is served in the mess. Good and quality education. Awareness programmes are also done. Also includes juices shop. Stationary shop and ATM inside the campus. Canteen is okay types. You may have to compromise with the canteens food as menu of the canteen is not so large. Various sports ground are in the campus such as basketball ground, volleyball and badminton court, cricket ground

paragraphs: Siddhi Vinayak Group of Colleges admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG, PG and After 10th levels in streams includingEngineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software.Siddhi Vinayak Group of Collegesadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asJEE Main, GATE, and REAP. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 66,000 - 3,15,500for UG, PG and After 10th level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 4 years.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, experience faculty, excellent facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is quite good enough. Classrooms are spacious, ventilated properly. Various advance technology are present in our classrooms like smart boards. Different labs are present for different courses and they are huge enough. Wi-Fi facility is available through out the college campus. Library consist of many technical books and online website is to download soft copies of newly launched books. Living space is clean & food is hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: The college has poor teaching quality and poor facilities.
reviews.review_text: The library in the college is average and doesn't provide any books for civil engineering branch. Wi-Fi facilities are available in the college. Classrooms are very bad. Quality of food is average. Hostel rooms are average. There are not many facilities in the hostel. The quality of food provided in the hostel is average.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best engineering college in Alwar.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. All the facilities are well-mannered, and labs are properly set. Sitting arrangements are classic. Auditorium and canteens are available in the college, and they are in good condition. There is a big playground and a small garden. Courses like B.Ed, BBA, MBA, BCA, MCA, diploma in engineering, etc., are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Siddhi Vinayak College, Alwar, Rajasthan.
reviews.review_text:
The infrastructure is quite good but there is no Wi-Fi for the students, it is only for the faculty members. There is no medical facility too.
The sports activity is average and the sports week is organized once in a year.
The library is quite good but there is a lack of good books.
Labs are good and properly managed with an average canteen.

Good infrastructure, experienced and great faculty, hostel is also good. Hygienic food is served in the mess. Good and quality education. Awareness programmes are also done. Also includes juices shop. Stationary shop and ATM inside the campus. Canteen is okay types. You may have to compromise with the canteens food as menu of the canteen is not so large. faqs.question: Q: How many seats are available at Netaji Institute of Engineering and Technology for all courses combined?

faqs.answer: Netaji Institute of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh. Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed Bachelor Degree (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B.Tech / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages). Examinations of minimum three years duration with at least 50% marks (45% marks in case of reserved categories) in the qualifying examinations. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis. The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH, 2003). No maximum age limit.

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Civil Engineering, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 56848, 61050 and 79353, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Netaji Institute of Engineering and Technology. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

Netaji Institute of Engineering and Technology allows admission to the MBA and MCA programs based on TSICET scores. For admission to Netaji Institute of Engineering and Technology, candidates must meet the required cutoff rank for their respective category and quota. However, the seats are now filled for 2024 admission across different categories of students belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Netaji Institute of Engineering and Technology TS ICET cutoff 2025 is yet to be released for admission.
