answer.text: Mittal Institute Of Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed 10+2 or equivalent with Physics, Maths & Chemistry/ Biotech./ Biology/ Tech. Voc. subject/ Comp. Sc./ IT/ Informatics Practices/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business studies as optional subjects with the above-mentioned aggregate percentage (40% for SC/ST/OBC candidates (except Creamy layer) candidates belonging to Madhya Pradesh) in subjects taken together. Candidates passed 10+2 with grading system, must have grades equi. to mentioned aggregate %. Candidates who had passed 10+2 with grace marks in any subject can also apply provided they have scored mentioned aggregate % excluding grace marks. Result awaited student are also eligible on provisional basis. OR Candidate who have passed Diploma in Engg. & Tech. examination with at least 45% masks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC (excluding creamy layer) category of Madhya Pradesh) Subject to vacancies in the First Year, in case the vacancies at lateral entry are exhausted.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th class examination/SSC examination or equivalent examination from any recognised board/center (10+2) system.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant branch of Engg./Technology with above mentioned percentage. The mentioned SC/ST percentage is for Madhya Pradesh residents. Candidate belonging to OBC (excluding creamy layer) categories of Madhya Pradesh should have at least 45%. Bachelors degree should be of minimum of four years duration and have been obtained from any AICTE approved institution or Indian University/ Institute or from a foreign University recognised by AIU or any Institutes of national importance (i.e. IITs/ IISc/NITs etc.) duly recognised by the MHRD, as equivalent thereto. Candidates in the Final year of above degree examinations can also apply on provisional basis. Rounding of marks or percentage is not permissible.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Graduation with mentioned percentage in aggregate of any UGC/AICTE approved Indian University or from a foreign University recognised by AIU or Institute recognised by the concerned University as equivalent thereto. The mentioned SC/ST percentage is for Madhya Pradesh residents. Candidates belonging to OBC (excluding creamy layer) categories of Madhya Pradesh can apply with at least 45%. The Bachelor's degree must be of minimum three years duration after passing Higher Secondary (10+2) examination of (10+2) system or equivalent. Candidates in the Final year of above degree examinations can also apply on provisional basis. Candidate who has passed qualifying examination with grace marks are also eligible for admission. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Just surely fantastic.

content.Placements: Around 55% or more of the students received placements and have begun the journey of their careers. The highest package is 1 LPA, and the lowest is Rs. 15,000 per month for 6 months. The highest percentage of students who got an internship is around 63-64%.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities at Mittal College are good, not that bad, like an average college. But the environment of the college is amazing, and it makes me to go to college every day. I don't live in the hostel, but according to one of my friends, the hostel food and services are good to live.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college infrastructure is good but they don't have good faculties.

content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good but they don't have wifi connections for the internet. The lab is also not good and not properly setup; the classroom is not too good and the library has very old books and a very small library. Many times students didn't get proper books.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am highly satisfied with the faculty and placements.

content.Placements: Almost 96% of students were placed in this course. The highest package is 15 LPAs, and the lowest package is 4 LPA. Recruiting companies are InfoSys, Google, and Amazon. The top roles offered are project manager, web developer, and software developer. 80% of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: The college's infrastructure and facilities are excellent. Every block has separate blocks. There are two computer labs and one digital library. There are many books available in the library and a good Wi-Fi connection with high-speed internet. The hostel facilities are nice, and the canteen food is tasty.

individual_reviews.title: The college is good, and all teachers are also supportive.

content.Placements: About 60-70% of the students from our course got placed every year. The minimum salary offered is Rs. 30,000 per month. Top recruiting companies like Larsen & Toubro, Tata, BHEL and GAIL visit our campus for placements. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Mittal Institute is a very good college. I am satisfied with it.

content.Placements: One of our seniors got placed on campus with the package of Rs. 2,50,000 per annum. Many companies visited the campus to offer placements, and students do participate in the drives. Wipro has selected many students from our college and also other colleges.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, library, medical facilities, sports and games facilities are available on the campus. Quality of classrooms and the playground is good. The hostel has 53 rooms. The facilities provided in the college are good.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Language Lab, Engineering labs

reviews.review_heading: Just surely fantastic.
reviews.review_text: The facilities at Mittal College are good, not that bad, like an average college. But the environment of the college is amazing, and it makes me to go to college every day. I don't live in the hostel, but according to one of my friends, the hostel food and services are good to live.

reviews.review_heading: The college infrastructure is good but they don't have good faculties.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good but they don't have wifi connections for the internet. The lab is also not good and not properly setup; the classroom is not too good and the library has very old books and a very small library. Many times students didn't get proper books.

reviews.review_heading: I am highly satisfied with the faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: The college's infrastructure and facilities are excellent. Every block has separate blocks. There are two computer labs and one digital library. There are many books available in the library and a good Wi-Fi connection with high-speed internet. The hostel facilities are nice, and the canteen food is tasty.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, and all teachers are also supportive.
reviews.review_text: All facilities provided by the college are good and supportive. Civil is the best department in our college. The canteen and hostel facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Mittal Institute is a very good college. I am satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, library, medical facilities, sports and games facilities are available on the campus. Quality of classrooms and the playground is good. The hostel has 53 rooms. The facilities provided in the college are good.

faqs.question: Q: Which major specializations are available at MM College of Technology, Raipur?

faqs.answer: MM College of Technology, Raipur has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate who has passed Diploma in Engineering/Architecture from a recognised board/university with 45% marks for UR category (40% marks for SC/ST/OBC and PWD category of Chattisgarh) can also apply for the course. Candidate passing 10th/12th through distance learning/open school shall be eligible for admission. Candidate passed Diploma programme through distance learning shall not be eligible to apply. If the candidate has passed 10+2 examination, but failed in one or more compulsory subject than the candidate shall not be considered eligible for admission. If the candidate is declared passed with grace as per the rule of related board than the candidate shall be eligible to apply. Candidate Upper age limit is 30 years for UR category, 35 years for PWD who belongs to UR category of Chattisgarh, 33 years for SC/ST/OBC and Female category of Chattisgarh, and 38 years for PWD who belongs to SC/ST/OBC and female category of Chattisgarh as on 1st of July of academic year.M.E./M.TechCandidate Upper age limit is 40 years for UR category, 45 years for PWD who belongs to UR category of Chattisgarh, 43 years for SC/ST/OBC and Female category of Chattisgarh, and 45 years for PWD who belongs to SC/ST/OBC and female category of Chattisgarh as on 1st of July of academic year.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th standard with Maths and Science or its equivalent exam from Board of Secondary Education Chhattisgarh/ any recognised board.

reviews_list.review_title: What I experienced at Visvesvaraya College is what I provided above in the form of a review.

review_content.Placements: At our college, around 70% students get placements. The students got a high package with 8 LPA. The average package is 4 LPA. At our college, the recruiters are Infosys, Wipro, TCS, and Tech Mahindra. Our seniors got internships in about 60% of core and IT firms, with roles like Software Engineer, Embedded Developer, and Network Engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel in our college, but there is one available near the college with all facilities. The food is very hygienic, and there is 24/7 Wi-Fi. At our college there is no dust at all. The labs are very clean. At our college, all books are available for students.

review_content.Infrastructure: In our college, there is no hostel provided. There is a private hostel near the college. The food is most hygienic and follows strict rules. In the hostel, there is 24/7 Wi-Fi. In labs, there is high quality equipment and there are good medical facilities.

review_summary.college_name: Visvesvaraya College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good college with good faculty.

content.Placements: 80% of students get placed in campus placement drives. They focus on student placement from the 2nd year of B.Tech, and provide guidance through WhatsApp groups about our placement drives on-campus. Students are placed with a minimum salary package of 3 LPA and a maximum of 11 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: We have good Wi-Fi speed, and it is always on. There are very well-organised laboratories with all the equipment required for the subject. The campus is very peaceful, clean, and tidy. There is a peaceful library, and they provide every book related to the subject. We can go to the library during library hours only.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied to join this college. They give us full confidence to get the job.

content.Placements: In our college, the placement rate is around 70%. The recruitment companies are Infosys, Wipro, TCS, etc. The average package is around 4 LPA - 7 LPA. The maximum package is around 10 LPA - 13 LPA. Some pass-out graduated students they still searching for jobs.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, there is no hostel. But there is a private hostel near the college. They provide hygienic food, and there is 24X7 Wi-Fi. Nearby there is a cricket ground. There is a washing machine for washing clothes. In our college, they provided high-quality lab equipment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: What I experienced at Visvesvaraya College is what I provided above in the form of a review.

content.Placements: At our college, around 70% students get placements. The students got a high package with 8 LPA. The average package is 4 LPA. At our college, the recruiters are Infosys, Wipro, TCS, and Tech Mahindra. Our seniors got internships in about 60% of core and IT firms, with roles like Software Engineer, Embedded Developer, and Network Engineer.
content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel in our college, but there is one available near the college with all facilities. The food is very hygienic, and there is 24/7 Wi-Fi. At our college there is no dust at all. The labs are very clean. At our college, all books are available for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of our Visvesvaraya college of education and technology.

content.Placements: In our college, around 70% of students got jobs from our college placements, with the highest package of 8 LPA, and some graduate students got average package of 4.5 LPA. The top recruiters included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra. 60% got internships.
content.Infrastructure: In our college, there is no hostel provided. There is a private hostel near the college. The food is most hygienic and follows strict rules. In the hostel, there is 24/7 Wi-Fi. In labs, there is high quality equipment and there are good medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with getting a seat at my college because of good faculty members.

content.Placements: I don't know much about the placements in our college, our seniors have informed us that the placement percentage is 70-75%. I know from our faculty members that the highest package is 10 LPA, and lowest package is 3.2 LPA. Top recruitment companies are Infosys, TCS, Cognizant, Wipro, Accenture, Capgemini, HC, etc. The students who get around 70% get internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has well-equipped infrastructure. They provide high-speed campus-wide Wi-Fi, and there is high-quality equipment for programming, databases, AI/ML, and networking. There is no hostel in our college. But near college there is private hostel. They provide hygienic food. It has 24X7 water and electricity facilities. College has playgrounds for cricket, football, and athletics. Indoor games like table tennis, chess, and carrom are also available.

description: Visvesvaraya College of Engineering and Technology cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Visvesvaraya College of Engineering and Technology TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 40107 and 74953 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the first round, the closing ra

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 40107, 51354 and 51830, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Visvesvaraya College of Engineering and Technology. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Visvesvaraya College of Engineering and Technology MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 25834. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 25451, and the 2023 cutoff was 25707 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been fluctuating in the last 3 years.

reviews.review_heading: The college offers freedom but very less strength.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Government Polytechnic College has a great campus.

review_content.Placements: Our college is great for the diploma course. Placements in our college are good. In the previous year, about 80% of the students from our course got placed. Some companies like SRT, Kribhaco, IOCL, Dalmia Sugar Factory and Yara Vera visit our campus for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides hostels for both boys and girls inside the campus. Wi-Fi facility is also available on the campus for students. The security is almost great, and there is 24 hours light. The college administration provides transport facility. Our college offers many branches like chemical engineering, mechanical engineering, diploma in computer science, electrical engineering, civil engineering, electronic engineering and mechanical engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good infrastructure from inside. Placements are done small packages.

review_content.Placements: Almost 68% of the students got placed from college. The highest salary offered was Rs. 20,000 per month, and the lowest salary offered was ranges from Rs. 10,000 per month - Rs. 15,000 per month. None of the companies comes these days for placements due to slow down market. Manufacturer company production has gone down in the previous year 2019-20. Let see how long time will the companies take to come for placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is not in good conditions. There is no canteen and Wi-Fi for students. Classroom conditions are like a government office. Hostel facilities are only for boys. The sports festival is celebrated every year. Those students who qualified in sports here go for state level and national level competitions.

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.
faqs.question: Q: What is covered in Machine Design subject in B.Tech course?

faqs.answer: The BTech Civil Engineering syllabus focuses on both theoretical lectures as well as practical work.With the help of lectures in the curriculum, theoretical concepts are introduced to students, tutorials provide space for solving problems and applications also.And the labs offer hands-on experience to students who get acquainted with equipment and CAD software. Also, the field projects also allow students to apply their B Tech Civil Engg. skills and knowledge to design and implement communication systems.

overview_faqs.question: Is Government Polytechnic College, Shahjahanpur a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Government Polytechnic College, Shahjahanpur is a renowned institution offering B.E. / B.Tech, After 10th Diploma. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Engineering. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Government Polytechnic College, Shahjahanpur boasts an impressive review rating of 3.2 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 4 for Campus Life, 3 for Placements, 3 for Faculty, and 3 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Government Polytechnic College, Shahjahanpur Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Government Polytechnic College has a great campus.

content.Placements: Our college is great for the diploma course. Placements in our college are good. In the previous year, about 80% of the students from our course got placed. Some companies like SRT, Kribhaco, IOCL, Dalmia Sugar Factory and Yara Vera visit our campus for placements.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides hostels for both boys and girls inside the campus. Wi-Fi facility is also available on the campus for students. The security is almost great, and there is 24 hours light. The college administration provides transport facility. Our college offers many branches like chemical engineering, mechanical engineering, diploma in computer science, electrical engineering, civil engineering, electronic engineering and mechanical engineering.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college has good infrastructure from inside. Placements are done small packages.

content.Placements: Almost 68% of the students got placed from college. The highest salary offered was Rs. 20,000 per month, and the lowest salary offered was ranges from Rs. 10,000 per month - Rs. 15,000 per month. None of the companies comes these days for placements due to slow down market. Manufacturer company production has gone down in the previous year 2019-20. Let see how long time will the companies take to come for placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is not in good conditions. There is no canteen and Wi-Fi for students. Classroom conditions are like a government office. Hostel facilities are only for boys. The sports festival is celebrated every year. Those students who qualified in sports here go for state level and national level competitions.

review_summary.college_name: College of Engineering, Pathanapuram Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with Faculty Members but Dissatisfied with Transportation and Canteen.

content.Placements: Placements are there, but they are very few compared to the number of students. Placements are very few, mainly for Computer Science students, for the past 2 years. Placement includes an aptitude test and also an interview. Salary packages are very low. I wish to take M.Tech after completing this B.Teach degree and after that apply for a job or to be placed from the college I am studying for M.Tech.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are good and have a good Wi-Fi connection. The library is also very good, as we could study there during exams. I am not a hosteler, but I stayed in the hostel during Teach Fest, Cape Fest, and all. Rooms are good, and the bathroom is also not bad. But the food is not as good as we eat at home. I don’t know other information as I am a day scholar. Life on campus is very cool as we have enough freedom in our college. Programs are very few compared to other colleges. We have a Teach Fest every year, and it is awesome. Everyone unites and makes the program better. It includes robotics expos, VR, fashion shows, dance competitions, music competitions, auto shows, pro shows, etc. Mainly, this tech fest is conducted in the April-May month. We have an arts fest also in the same time period. In arts, we are able to show our talents and win prizes for good performances. Sports are there in our college. We have a physical education faculty. He tries his best to encourage students and make them participate in inter-college meets, state sports meets, etc. Sports competitions are also held in our college once a year. The college has many Instagram pages, and when we search on Google, we get enough information about the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College is not a bad choice, and in academics you should work on yourself to get placed.

content.Placements: Around 10-20% of students get placed with an average package of 2.5 LPA. The highest package offered in my knowledge was 4.2 LPA The lowest was 1.8 LPA. There are not many well-known companies for placement. Even TCS and Infosys don't come every year. The new rule in KTU allows final-year students to get internships in their final year instead of attending college physically.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are normal. Labs are equipped and work normally. The hostel facility is only available for girls, and food is provided by the canteen, which is average in my opinion. Boys stay as PG, and food is included. There is a field for football that is used to play cricket, handball, khokho, and whatnot.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of College of Engineering, Pathanapuram.

content.Placements: The college offers average placement with very low LPA; many startups come for recruitment, but only a few students get placed. However, some better companies also come for recruitment, such as Infosys, Wipro, and TCS, but they offer only a basic salary of 7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The college has an average hostel, situated in a rural area. If you want to go to town, the only way is to ride your bike; bus services are few, and there are no buses at night. However, the hostel has a beautiful ambiance and is friendly. There are many activities for passing the time.

reviews.review_heading: Review of College of Engineering, Pathanapuram.
reviews.review_text: The college has an average hostel, situated in a rural area. If you want to go to town, the only way is to ride your bike; bus services are few, and there are no buses at night. However, the hostel has a beautiful ambiance and is friendly. There are many activities for passing the time.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college with a nice ambience.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facility is little good compared to other colleges because there's no restriction in college hostel. The hostel food is also very nice and tasty. Sometimes the food is very bad, but most of the time, food is nice. It is worthy for that money; hostel ambience is also nice.

reviews.review_heading: Something you should know before selecting a course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is literally average compared to a college building but above average when compared to a dog house; libraries are not that bad since no one uses them; classrooms are dirty; labs are not properly maintained; and Wi-Fi is literally poor. Sports and games are given more importance. It only has a women's hostel; according to the hostelers, every service is bad there.

reviews.review_heading: I love this college life.
reviews.review_text: The lab facility is good but not much great. There are labs for every department. Among that, computer labs are pretty good. Wi-Fi facility is not good as they offer about 30 MB of data per student, which is not at all useful. There is a college hostel facility for girls only. The boys' hostel is available privately near the college. The canteen is average and small. There is a huge football ground on the backside of the college.

reviews.review_heading: There are good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The lab facility is good but not much great. There are labs for every department. Among that, computer labs are pretty good. Wi-Fi facility is not good as they offer about 30 MB of data per student, which is not at all useful. There is a college hostel facility for girls only, and the boys' hostel is available privately near the college. The college canteen is average and small. There is a huge football ground on the backside of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the academic curriculum. Even though the infrastructure is bad, I'm okay with that
reviews.review_text: I am dissatisfied with the infrastructure. Sometimes, lab computers won't work properly. I am a day scholar, but mostly hostels are bad, and the food is bad, except in the girls' hostel (but the food is still bad). Sports and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: It's a quite good place to study.
reviews.review_text: Oru college consist of an administrative block, a civil block, a mechanical block and a block for electrical and electronics departments and also has hostel facilities for girls. Private hostels are available for boys near college has a good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: My college is not good in academics.
reviews.review_text: There is poor Wi-Fi, average labs, below-average classrooms, and an average library. Very bad hostel and warden. The canteen food is not tasty. There are no medical facilities available at this college. Low support for sports programmes like football, cricket, etc. They don't encourage sports.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements and good college facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the hostel are quite good. The food is provided by the canteen, and it is very healthy and good. There is a wide opportunity for students who are interested in sports. The college provides funds for competition in sports. Both men's and women's sports are equally promoted by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Good environment and satisfied college life.
reviews.review_text: There are different facilities and infrastructures available in our college, including wi-fi facility, labs, classrooms, library, canteen, playing ground etc. There is a hospitality team for first aid activities. Girls' hostel is provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of College of Engineering, Pathanapuram.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities provided in our college are the best. It has various labs and for our course, there are fluid mechanics, material testing, concrete technology, survey, CAD lab, etc. Food served in the hostel is of minimum quality.

review_content.Placements: An average number of placements come for the civil department. The placements like TCS and KPTCL may hire few students, and very less percentage of students were placed. review_summary.college_name: Sri Dharmsthala Manjunatheshwar College of Engineering & Technology - Karnataka Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and placements.

content.Placements: Our college has the best campus selection. Our average campus salary is INR 5 lakh. The top recruiting companies are Infosys and Wipro. The highest package was INR 24 lacs, the lowest maybe INR 2 lacs, and above 70 to 80% of students got internship offers. I don't know about the roles, but even civil students got placed.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has the best infrastructure made of rocks, and Wi-Fi is 2 GB per day for students. We have clean libraries and classrooms. The hostel is fully vegetarian, with a variety of items daily, and on Saturday, ice cream is given. We also have a medical facility, a sports ground, a badminton hall, table tennis, and all other sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Review of Sri Dharmsthala Manjunatheshwar College of Engineering & Technology.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are very good. Almost 85% of the students were placed. The highest salary package offered was 14 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA. The average salary package offered was 5 LPA. Companies like TCS, Goldman Sachs, Dell, Informatica, Tech Mahindra, Sony, Oracle, KPIT Cummins, Y Media Labs, etc., visited our campus for placements. Roles of a developer, tester and admin were offered to students.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities like Wi-Fi, classrooms, library, medical facilities, sports and games were available in our college. Quality of labs and rooms was good. Canteen food was good at reasonable prices. Hostel rooms were good. Only thing AC was not there. Hostel food was awesome. I didn't face any infrastructure related issues.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Faculty members are good with students. Placements are average.

content.Placements: An average number of placements come for the civil department. The placements like TCS and KPTCL may hire few students, and very less percentage of students were placed. The average salary package offered is Rs. 3.5 LPA. They held separate coaching to crack placements in our college. Guest lectures were arranged to give seminars about the pavements.
content.Infrastructure: We have good laboratories and classes. Wi-Fi connection is not provided for mobiles, but they provide only for laptops, two canteens, and in hostels. Cool water facility is available in summer. They provided three hostels for boys and one for girls along with one B.Ed faculty. A beautiful Ganesha temple is available on our campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for career.

content.Placements: Placement of this college is really good. A good number of companies had visited our college to hire students. It was really a great placement for our batch. More than 450 students got placed in various companies. Oracle, TCS, KPIT, Goldman Sachs, Mindtree, Mindcraft, etc. and many more companies came to hire. The highest package was 14 lacs which was offered by Goldman Sachs. 200+ students got placed in TCS only. Oracle company came 3 times with 7.5 lpa, 6.5 lpa and 5.5 lpa packages. The highest package was 14 lacs and the lowest package is 2.75 which was offered by Amazon.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Our college is worth the money with very good environment for learning.

content.Placements: The highest salary package offered was 30 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 3 LPA in our branch. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Amazon, Wipro, Infosys, Accenture, Cognizant, Samsung, and Tata Motors. Around 80% of students got placed. Placement training helps us know about all the aspects of placements.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel facility is very good. All the facilities are available. Our campus is very good with greenery. We have a separate hostel for different year students. Water facilities are very good. Food quality is good, neat, and healthy. We have medical emergency facilities and good support for sports.

review_content.Placements: More than 70% of the students got selected on the campus. The minimum salary offered ranges between Rs. 8,000-24,000 per month. review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel was good, and it provides 4 hostels, i.e., h1 to h4. All hostels include warm water for winters. More than 25 solar panels are fixed on each hostel. Food served in the mess was not good, but the rooms were really good with attached bathrooms. A fee of the hostel is Rs. 60,000 per annum. All the hostel's staff members were helpful. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The college provides separate libraries for different courses. The college provides huge ground, basketball court and cricket ground. It provides Lipton canteen and hostel canteen facility. There is a parking facility for hostel students. The campus is fully secured BY BSF 24 officers with guns.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mining Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Review of Pacific Polytechnic College, Pacific University.

content.Placements: My course strength is 56 students. The lowest package offered in my course is 20,000 per month, and the highest package is above 50,000. Recruiters are Aditya Birla Group, Hindustan Zinc Limited, JK Lakshmi etc. 60% of students got internships. This course offers talent and skills development classes as well.
content.Infrastructure: Free Wi-Fi, clean classrooms with perfect tables and chairs, and a library are available. The hostel facilities are the best. Cleanliness is good. Water facilities are good. A mess is available. Sports are the best. A cricket ground and a playground are available.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: If you only want to study then, this university is perfect for you.

content.Placements: More than 70% of the students got selected on the campus. The minimum salary offered ranges between Rs. 8,000-24,000 per month. I did an internship in Allen's Auto Industries and National Fertilizers Limited for 1.5 months in both. I was passed out in the year 2015. Our university offers more than 20 cources, i.e., ITI to PhD.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel was good, and it provides 4 hostels, i.e., h1 to h4. All hostels include warm water for winters. More than 25 solar panels are fixed on each hostel. Food served in the mess was not good, but the rooms were really good with attached bathrooms. A fee of the hostel is Rs. 60,000 per annum. All the hostel's staff members were helpful. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The college provides separate libraries for different courses. The college provides huge ground, basketball court and cricket ground. It provides Lipton canteen and hostel canteen facility. There is a parking facility for hostel students. The campus is fully secured BY BSF 24 officers with guns.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mining Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Best Private College in Udaipur.

content.Placements: Some IT companies organize their pool campus for all branches. Companies from Udaipur visited our campus regularly. All over about 10 percent student only placed through campus placement. Beside student place through their own reference. College requires attention on placements.
content.Infrastructure: Pacific is a private college. It has a big campus and all good infrastructure facility is available. The hostel has also a good building. Labs are well-equipped. All over there are all facilities available for all streams. Students from Gujarat and nearby states are also joined Pacific for study.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mining Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and good infrastructure of pacific.

content.Placements: Placements are good and the students are doing well and the placements are done in good companies and have an average salary of 18k per month and internship provided by college is good and almost all the students are covered for that and many companies give internship.
content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure and have best environment for studies. We have good library and have labs for practicals and have good hostels and proper canteen with good and hygienic food and also have football and volleyball court for games and they have good sports teachers.

highlights.summary:
WBJEE 2026 registration has begun for Bengal Institute of Technology and Management admission to the BE/BTech course. Students can register till Apr 5, 2026, for the exam scheduled for May 24, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview:
WBJEE 2026 registration has begun for Bengal Institute of Technology and Management admission to the BE/BTech course. Students can register till Apr 5, 2026, for the exam scheduled for May 24, 2026.

Established in 2003, Bengal Institute of Technology and Management is a private institute in Birbhum, West Bengal. The institute is approved by the AICTE. At the UG, PG and After 10th levels, the institute offers 17 courses across 7 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular Bengal Institute of Technology and Management programs include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, BCA and BBA. Bengal Institute of Technology and Management courses are provided in several streams including Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Law and Hospitality & Travel, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 1014 students. The fees at Bengal Institute of Technology and Management ranges between INR 1,25,500 to 3,55,500 for the different courses. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

faqs.answer: A:    Bengal Institute of Technology and Management provides programmes including B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, After 10th Diploma, MBA/PGDM, BBA, BCA, BHM, LL.B. in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Hospitality & Travel, Law, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The faculty members are too good.

review_content.Placements: 90% of students from the CSE branch get placed with an average of 4 LPA, and the highest package is 21 LPA in Wipro, Amazon, TCS, and top IIT companies. Students basically get internships after the 3rd year, in the 5th semester. The mentors are very helpful; they help too much in completing our project and making the best one out of this.
review_content.Infrastructure: The faculty members and infrastructure are very good. There is a separate building for the girls' hostel and the boys' hostel. The guards are very well-aware. Wi-Fi, labs with AC and with all the essentials. More than 50 classrooms with AC are provided. The hostels are very safe for girls; there is no need to worry.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: 1. There are very less number of students who opt for sitting in placements for BCA course from this college. Generally students prepare either for government exams or they prepare for MCA entrance exam. 2. Salary package offered after this course lies somewhere between 1.4 lacs to 2 lacs per annum. 3. TCS, Wipro, Cognizant basically hires BCA graduates from our college. 4. For the internship Students have to apply off-campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: 1. The best part of our college is that it is surrounded by greenery with a calm, quiet, and peaceful environment. The college infrastructure is outstanding with 60 acres of land. Our college provides all the major modern amenities required by the students here. The classroom, library and labs are well maintained. Teachers are very helpful here. 2. Girls hostel is there on campus whereas the boys hostel is 1 km away from the college campus. Hostels here are in average condition, not too good not too bad. There is a large canteen available. Food from mess is served with good portions and they are typically made in Bengali style. Medical facilities are provided free to students within the campus. Equipment for sports is basically in the hostel managed by the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Bengal Institute of Technology and Management is the best engineering colleges in West Bengal.

review_content.Placements: The college focus on placements every year. The college placement authorities always manage to place the maximum number of students in good and reputed companies. All the teaching faculty members make the students prepare for the placement test of various companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is above average. Our college provides facilities like well-established classrooms, well-equipped labs and a huge playground, which makes the look of college awesome. The infrastructure of both boys and girls hostel is good. The food facility is also good here.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: The most Pathetic Engineering College. Nothing good to be said about the college.

review_content.Placements: Placement was really poor in this course as well as in the college, infact it is poor for the last 7-8 years. Hardly any student of my batch or the passing out batch was placed on campus. Among the few placed the salary was around 10-15 K per month and that to in some unregistered companies. The job profile was of BPO and not of Software Developer or web Designer or anything such related to my course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The condition of the Infrastructure was also very poor. 1. Labs : were not up to the mark. Most of the desktops were many of the time not working and very outdated in the computer lab. The other labs also had the same condition, be it Electronics or Electrical where the electrical equipments and appliances would hardly function, same goes with the other labs. Most of the times the practical experiments were canceled due to lack of infrastructure. 2. Classrooms : condition was pathetic. Chairs all broken, walls engraved by pens. 3. No proper washroom or drinking facilities in the campus 4. Library : did not have the books that was required in the course 5. Wi-Fi : Campus didn't have Wi-Fi facility though at hostel it was there with good speed. 6. Hostel : It was also in poor condition, which lacked basic amenities. Mess food was not hygienic. No proper medical facilities. No sports and no games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and qualified teachers

review_content.Placements: In out department the highest salary 12 k and the lowest salary 8 k was offered and the top recruiter was Godrej construction. Site civil engineer roles was offered. Civil engineer is the highest role offered. Some companies in Kolkata, companies in vishapatanam and rambilli offered the internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure available in our department is wi-fi, labs, classroom, Library. My hostel quality and facilities in hostel were good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen was good. Medical facilities, sports and games were available.

paragraphs: The Bengal Institute of Technology and Management admission process is mostly merit-based. To get a seat, students need to go through all the steps as per guidelines. Bengal Institute of Technology and Management offers UG, PG and After 10th level courses. Candidates are shortlisted for the programmes based on their academic merit and past academic scores. The process starts with registration.

courses_data.name: Bengal Institute of Technology and Management BCA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Bengal Institute of Technology and Managementoffers BCA for 3 years at the UG level. Admission to BCA programme is based on CBSE 12th and WBCHSE scores of the aspirants. The total tuition fees for BCA isINR 1,32,500. Check below the eligibility for BCA course at Bengal Institute of Technology and Management: Eligibility Criteria

The final selection for admission to the Bengal Institute of Technology and Management B.E. / B.Tech course is based on the student's performance in the mentioned exams. The Bengal Institute of Technology and Management After 10th Diploma fee isINR 1,30,000depending upon the specialisation. hostel_campus.college_name: Bengal Institute of Technology and Management Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The Institute has 2 hostels facility with capacity of 1000 students

library.description: Institute has 1 well equipped library with 665444 books 4444 Journals
Institute has 1 well equipped library with 665444 books 4444 Journals

hostel.description: The Institute has 2 hostels facility with capacity of 1000 students

reviews.review_heading: The faculty members are too good.
reviews.review_text: The faculty members and infrastructure are very good. There is a separate building for the girls' hostel and the boys' hostel. The guards are very well-aware. Wi-Fi, labs with AC and with all the essentials. More than 50 classrooms with AC are provided. The hostels are very safe for girls; there is no need to worry.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text:
1. The best part of our college is that it is surrounded by greenery with a calm, quiet, and peaceful environment. The college infrastructure is outstanding with 60 acres of land. Our college provides all the major modern amenities required by the students here. The classroom, library and labs are well maintained. Teachers are very helpful here. 
2. Girls hostel is there on campus whereas the boys hostel is 1 km away from the college campus. Hostels here are in average condition, not too good no...

reviews.review_heading: Bengal Institute of Technology and Management is the best engineering colleges in West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is above average. Our college provides facilities like well-established classrooms, well-equipped labs and a huge playground, which makes the look of college awesome. The infrastructure of both boys and girls hostel is good. The food facility is also good here.

reviews.review_heading: The most Pathetic Engineering College. Nothing good to be said about the college.
reviews.review_text:
The condition of the Infrastructure was also very poor. 
1. Labs : were not up to the mark. Most of the desktops were many of the time not working and very outdated in the computer lab. The other labs also had the same condition, be it Electronics or Electrical where the electrical equipments and appliances would hardly function, same goes with the other labs. Most of the times the practical experiments were canceled due to lack of infrastructure. 
2. Classrooms : condition was pathetic. Chairs ...

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and qualified teachers
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure available in our department is wi-fi, labs, classroom, Library. 
My hostel quality and facilities in hostel were good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen was good. Medical facilities, sports and games were available.
